svg.title: Manifest-centric case management system architecture
svg.desc: A manifest TSV file grows columns as analyses complete. Pipelines, scripts, and Claude Code agents all append results back to the manifest.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would the Nextflow pipeline append columns to the manifest?')
sendPrompt('How would SLURM scripts append columns to the manifest?')
sendPrompt('How would Claude Code agents append columns to the manifest?')

g.text: CLI tool: joins new columns by sample_id

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would the manifest status dashboard work?')

svg.text: Every analysis writes a per-sample results file
casetrack append joins it to manifest.tsv by sample_id
One row per sample, one column per analysis — always growing right
